steps.title: Target subject matter
steps.content: The student wants to contrast what the two prints depict, not when they were made or what technique produced them. The notes describe Clarke's Hyde Park as a tranquil, everyday city-park scene. They describe Ndlovu's Amanzi Amthatha as a scene with an explicitly political point of view.

steps.title: Avoid medium and date contrasts
steps.content: A contrasts medium and falsely treats linocut and relief print as separate categories, even though the notes say linocutting is a type of relief printing. C contrasts dates. D focuses on printmaking technique and repeats the false medium contrast. None of those choices compares the prints' subject matter. The answer is B.
